title: Woodhaven Reviews - Niche

title: FOREST PARK - Updated June 2026 - 351 Photos & 92 Reviews
content: First time REALLY exploring Forest Park's trails in Queens today. If you are looking for a nice peaceful nature walk I definitely recommend coming here.

title: 8 great things to do in Woodhaven New York - Let's Roam

NYC's NEWEST Observation Deck in Times Square (Best View in NYC) : FIRST LOOK & REVIEW

Filmed December 16, 2025

NYC’s NEWEST Observation Deck in Times Square On top of One Times Square Just Opened! It will give you 360-degree views of the area and the chance to interact with the new New Year's Eve Ball.

Ticket Tiers & Pricing
There are three ticket offerings currently open to the public:

1. Viewing Deck (Starts at $28)
*   Access to the 360-degree wraparound deck with river-to-river views overlooking Times Square.

2. Viewing Deck + NYE Ball Access (Starts at $78)
*   Includes the viewing deck plus an up-close view of the new "Constellation Ball" and photo opportunities before the attraction officially opens next year.

3. Viewing Deck + NYE Ball Access + Crystal Gift (Starts at $128)
*   Includes the full experience (Deck and Ball access) plus a commemorative 2025 Crystal designed for the new Ball. 

Visit onetimessqure.com and Grab your tickets now!
